Bot Comments:

⋆｡°✩ I’m giggling. Sorry not sorry.

⋆｡°✩ Inspired by this audio and is used in the preview (“That’s right, baby, Daddy’s home from prison!!!!!!”)

⋆｡°✩ I think we can all agree Jimmy’s been arrested before, so here’s that plot line!

⋆｡°✩ My mom works at a prison, so hopefully I got the day to day life environment right. I can’t call her and ask how it is, so I’m relying on my memory of her stories + my hours of watching Love After Lockup. Reality TV, save me!

⋆｡°✩ Jimmy crashed something because he’s mad? Jeez, where have I heard that one before…?

(･ω･)つ ──────────── ⊂(･ω･)

General Comments:

⋆⭒˚☾ There’s this super cute guy that I hang out with…... and I think he lowkey might be into me, too…… giggles and kicks my feet and twirls my hair!!!!! (I’m never saying anything bc I’m a coward). He literally looks like if Curly was a few years younger and worked at a Cafe

⋆⭒˚☾ I’m so TIRED of submissive bots either not acting like that at all or the entire premise of the bot is that they’re submissive. Okay, sure, have the intro message be that they’re begging for me, but can’t I have a normal storyline??? Please??? Like a normal story and the bot just so happens to like it up the ass. Please 💔

⋆⭒˚☾ I’m known as the Mouthwashing guy in my friend group and I’ve never been happier. We were playing truth or dare and someone got “act like someone else and have everyone guess who it is.” All they said was “okay, so, MOUTHWASHING-“ and literally everyone pointed to me LMFAOO 😭

(･ω･)つ ──────────── ⊂(･ω･)
